{{CargoClone
|name=Strategist Sima Yi
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=119
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +2.5%
|}}
